---
title: "Figure 5 (macro_IR sample distortion collapse) — scan of the instrument-weight W"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

<!--
Sample distortion (Gaussian) vs the collapse variable x_B = 1/(N_ch*interval + W*noise/interval), scanned
over the instrument weight W, for all N_ch and all noise. If a single W collapses the curves, all colours
(N_ch) and shapes (noise) fall on one line per panel. Best W (max collapse R^2) is param-dependent
(k_off ~10, k_on ~1, N_ch ~3, i ~100), and the collapse is only moderate (R^2 0.36-0.74) -- a hint that
the gating term should carry the parameter's own rate. 1c2ae6f, Gaussian_Sample_Distortion diagonal.
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r data}
SAMP     <- "Probit_statistics_Gaussian_Sample_Distortion"
NOISES   <- c("0.1", "1", "10")
W_SET    <- c(1, 3, 10, 30)
PIDX     <- c(on = 0, off = 1, unitary_current = 2, Num_ch_mean = 5)
PARAM_LAB<- c(on = "log[10]~k[on]", off = "log[10]~k[off]",
              unitary_current = "log[10]~i", Num_ch_mean = "log[10]~N[ch]")

read_noise <- function(z) map_dfr(Sys.glob(sprintf(
  "../data/1c2ae6f/figure_3_G_nch_*_nsim_10000_macro_IR_noise_%s_battery_pool_G.csv", z)),
  ~ read.csv(.x, skip = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)) %>% mutate(noise = z)
d <- map_dfr(NOISES, read_noise) %>%
  filter(component_path == SAMP, statistic == "value", probit == "mean",
         param_index == param_col, param_index %in% PIDX) %>%
  mutate(param_name = names(PIDX)[match(param_index, PIDX)], nz = as.numeric(noise)) %>%
  group_by(param_name, noise, nz, Num_ch, interval_in_tau) %>%
  summarise(D = mean(value), .groups = "drop")

dw <- map_dfr(W_SET, ~ d %>% mutate(
  W = .x, x_B = 1 / (Num_ch * interval_in_tau + .x * nz / interval_in_tau))) %>%
  mutate(nch_f  = factor(Num_ch),
         noisef = factor(paste("noise", noise), levels = paste("noise", NOISES)),
         W_lab  = factor(paste("W =", W), levels = paste("W =", W_SET)),
         param  = factor(param_name, levels = names(PIDX), labels = unname(PARAM_LAB)))
```

```{r plot, fig.width = 8.5, fig.height = 8.5}
g <- ggplot(dw, aes(x_B, D, colour = nch_f, shape = noisef, group = interaction(nch_f, noise))) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, colour = "grey45", linewidth = .3, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_line(linewidth = .3, alpha = .5) + geom_point(size = .9) +
  facet_grid(param ~ W_lab, scales = "free", labeller = labeller(param = label_parsed)) +
  scale_x_log10() + scale_y_log10() +
  scale_colour_viridis_d(name = expression(N[ch]), end = .92, direction = -1) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(16, 17, 15), name = NULL) +
  labs(x = expression(x[B]==1 / (N[ch] %.% Delta + W %.% noise / Delta)),
       y = "sample distortion (diagonal)") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 9, base_family = "Helvetica") +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "right",
        axis.text = element_text(size = 6.5), axis.title = element_text(size = 8.5),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 8))
g
ggsave("Figure_5_IR_sample_collapse_W.pdf", g, width = 8.5, height = 8.5)
```
